texto: To understand karma, you must realize that thoughts are things. The very universe…is composed not of matter but of consciousness. Matter responds, far more than most people realize, to the power of thought. For will power directs energy, and energy in turn acts upon matter. Matter, indeed, is energy.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Paramahansa Yoganandamahansa Yogananda sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “To understand karma, you must realize that thoughts are things. The very universe…is composed not…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, energy, karna, útil em momentos de karna e matter.
